Grand Hotel Downtown

4.2
892 reviews
Business Traveler
a month ago Clean rooms, great location. The staff was very helpful with luggage. Lobby is beautiful.
Tourist123
2 weeks ago Decent hotel but overpriced for what you get. WiFi was slow and the breakfast buffet was mediocre.
Family Trip
3 days ago Perfect for families! Kids loved the pool. Very quiet at night despite being downtown.
